text.title: manifest-then-fetch Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 high-impact failure modes for manifest-then-fetch with detectors and fixes that map back to rules in 01-core-rules.xml.

antipattern.symptom: Manifest preview leaked the full body
antipattern.root-cause: preview_strategy was 'head-N' with N too large.
antipattern.fix: Cap preview at 200 tokens; if more needed, use structured summary.
antipattern.detector: Sample 10 manifests; assert size_tokens reported ≤ preview_strategy cap.

antipattern.fix: Set retention_ttl_seconds ≤24h; reaper job removes expired.

antipattern.root-cause: execution_id expired between preview and fetch.
antipattern.fix: Set TTL ≥ max turn-latency × max_turns; document the contract.
antipattern.detector: Force a slow turn; verify fetch still works.

antipattern.symptom: Agent fetches every manifest immediately, defeating the purpose
antipattern.fix: Prompt says 'fetch only if size_tokens > N AND you need the body'; show 2 examples.
